title: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for the 03 Anganwadi Worker Posts
description: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Recruitment 2026. To fill up the 03 vacancies for Anganwadi Worker Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Intermediate (10+2) can use this chance and apply for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 . Here we include the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
